zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Blanchminster於1304年出生在英國可瓦爾斯特拉頓時，她的父親Sir Ranulph de Blancminster26歲，母親Mary Wake24歲。她於1316年之前與Thomas de Neville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Blanchminster于1304年出生在英国可瓦爾斯特拉頓时，她的父亲Sir Ranulph de Blancminster26岁，母亲Mary Wake24岁。她于1316年之前与Thomas de Neville结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Blanchminster was born in 1304, in Stratton, Cornwall, England, her father, Sir Ranulph de Blancminster, was 26 and her mother, Mary Wake, was 24. She married Thomas de Neville before 1316. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Blanchminster est née en 1304, à Stratton, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ranulph de Blancminster, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary Wake, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Neville avant 1316. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Blanchminster 1304 in Stratton, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ranulph de Blancminster 26 und ihre Mutter Mary Wake 24. Sie hat vor 1316 Thomas de Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Blanchminster è nata il nel 1304 nel Stratton, Cornwall, England, sua padre, Sir Ranulph de Blancminster, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mary Wake, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Neville prima del 1316. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Blanchminsterが1304年にイギリスコルンワルストラットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Ranulph de Blancminsterは26歳，母Mary Wakeは24歳であった。1316年以前にThomas de Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Blanchminster(이)가 1304년 영국 코른월 스트래턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ranulph de Blancminster(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Wake(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1316년 이전 Thomas de Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Blanchminster nasceu em 1304, em Stratton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ranulph de Blancminster, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mary Wake, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Neville antes 1316. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Blanchminster родилась в 1304 г. в местности страттон, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ranulph de Blancminster было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Wake, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Neville перед 1316 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери.

sm.from 1316 to 1368: mai le 1316 e o'o I le 1368

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Blanchminster nació en 1304, en Stratton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ranulph de Blancminster, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mary Wake, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Thomas de Neville antes de 1316. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas.
